AI-Powered Strategic Foresight

From strategic questions to actionable future scenarios.

Strategic AI turns uncertainty into a clear decision surface. Twelve specialized AI agents scan signals, map drivers, construct four plausible futures, and produce executive-ready strategic options in minutes.

Book Enterprise Demo Explore the 12-agent pipeline
12 specialized agents in sequence
3-6 min for complete scenario generation
4 futures validated scenarios per analysis

Live workflow monitor

Live run
Active question

What are the possible futures of enterprise AI adoption in financial services by 2029?

01
Focal Question Refinement Clarifies scope, time horizon, and decision context
Done
04
Trend Detection Surfacing 7 major trends and 4 emerging issues
Done
07
Scenario Construction Building 2x2 matrix from high-impact uncertainties
Running
Regulated Intelligence High adoption, tight compliance frameworks
Automation Divide Uneven adoption across incumbents and challengers
Trusted Augmentation Human-centered AI with measurable governance
Shadow Systems Rapid adoption outruns oversight capacity
PDCR quality score in progress 92 / 100 estimated completeness
95%+ workflow success rate with smart retries
20+ cognitive biases detected and mitigated
100+ concurrent workflows supported
<100ms database query latency on PostgreSQL
Core Capabilities

Enterprise foresight built as a working system, not a slide deck.

Strategic AI combines orchestration, grounded analysis, validation, and export-ready outputs into a single workflow.

12

Multi-agent strategic pipeline

Twelve purpose-built agents move from question refinement to scenario narratives, strategy options, and executive reporting.

  • Signal detection and weak signal scanning
  • STEEPM and driving force analysis
  • Four divergent 2x2 scenarios with narratives
RAG

Document-grounded intelligence

Upload internal reports, market research, and scanned documents to ground outputs with your own evidence base.

  • PDF, Word, Markdown, and text ingestion
  • Semantic chunking with relevance retrieval
  • Optional OCR for scanned material
QC

Validation and bias control

Every scenario is scored for plausibility, desirability, coherence, and relevance, with explicit bias detection built in.

  • PDCR validation framework
  • 20+ cognitive biases checked
  • Quality and actionability scoring
RT

Real-time workflow visibility

Users can watch each agent run, inspect output quality, and follow the workflow instead of waiting for a single batch result.

  • Live agent-by-agent monitoring
  • Token, latency, and cost metrics
  • Execution timing and traceability
LLM

Provider-flexible model routing

Connect OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, OpenRouter, Ollama, or another OpenAI-compatible endpoint with per-agent model selection.

  • Primary and fallback providers
  • Fast and thinking mode model sets
  • Cost-aware orchestration
EXP

Executive-ready outputs

Strategic AI produces reports and data artifacts that can move directly into leadership review, planning workshops, or integration pipelines.

  • Markdown, PDF, DOCX, and JSONC exports
  • Strategic options and action roadmaps
  • Shareable scenario summaries
12-Agent Workflow

Inspect how each agent turns ambiguity into a defensible strategy view.

Select a stage to see what the agent contributes, what it consumes, and what it outputs.

Agent 01

Focal Question Refinement

Strategic framing

The first agent turns an open-ended request into a decision-oriented brief with a time horizon, a target domain, and explicit assumptions for the rest of the workflow.

3 decision constraints defined
10s average execution
1 clarified focal question
  • Defines scope, time horizon, and decision audience.
  • Normalizes ambiguous language into a strategic question.
  • Prepares a clean handoff for downstream agents.
Scenario Design

Outputs are built for comparison, discussion, and decision pressure-testing.

Each workflow produces four futures that make uncertainty visible rather than abstract.

Scenario A

Coordinated Leap

Strong regulation and strong enterprise adoption produce rapid transformation with high trust and institutional confidence.

Scenario B

Fragmented Acceleration

Adoption outruns governance, creating pockets of advantage and rising operational risk across sectors.

Scenario C

Cautious Reinvention

Leadership teams move carefully, using AI augmentation where evidence, governance, and ROI are strongest.

Scenario D

Stalled Trust

Public backlash, compliance friction, and uneven data quality delay transformation and reward operational resilience.

Dual Modes

Run a fast exploratory pass or a deeper thinking-mode analysis.

Both modes use the same workflow foundation. The difference is depth, token budget, and divergence pressure.

Use Cases

Designed for teams making bets under uncertainty, from strategy to market entry.

Strategic AI is structured for teams that need analysis they can use, not just admire.

Strategy teams

Long-term strategic planning

Explore 5-20 year futures, identify signals to monitor, and prepare strategic options that remain robust across scenarios.

Product leaders

Market entry and positioning

Combine market research analysis with scenario planning to pressure-test product launches and segmentation decisions.

Consultancies

Client-ready foresight workflows

Turn strategic foresight methods into repeatable, scalable delivery with export-ready reports and shared workflows.

Public sector

Risk and resilience planning

Model critical infrastructure, policy disruption, and early warning indicators to build scenario-based resilience plans.

Plans and Specs

Choose the operating model that fits your team maturity and scale.

Start with a guided demo, then move into production workflows, document analysis, and enterprise deployment.

Primary workflow12-agent strategic foresight pipeline with 4 validated scenarios
Additional moduleMarket research analysis with PESTEL, Porter's Five Forces, SWOT, TOWS
Execution modesFast mode and thinking mode with per-mode model selection
Document analysisRAG with PDF, TXT, Markdown, Word, OCR-ready uploads
TraceabilityEntity IDs across signals, trends, forces, scenarios, and strategy outputs
ValidationPDCR scoring, schema validation, bias detection, smart retry loops
InfrastructurePostgreSQL, Redis, optional Qdrant, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD ready
SecurityBasic auth, rate limiting, CORS middleware, enterprise deployment options
ObservabilityExecution traces, token usage, cost estimation, LangSmith integration
ExportsMarkdown, PDF, DOCX, JSONC, publish-ready executive reports

Enterprise

Scale

For organizations requiring deployment flexibility, custom integration, and collaboration at scale.

Custom
deployment and SLA
  • Custom model routing and provider setup
  • Deployment to cloud, Kubernetes, or on-prem
  • Priority support, observability, and governance
Design deployment

“Strategic AI compresses weeks of synthesis into a single guided workflow. The difference is not speed alone. It makes assumptions, uncertainty, and tradeoffs visible enough for leadership teams to act on.”

Designed for strategy leaders, innovation teams, consultants, and enterprise operators.

Scenario divergence by design

Outputs are tuned to create meaningfully different futures, not cosmetic variations.

Audit trail for every insight

Entity IDs connect signals to trends, scenarios, and strategic actions end to end.

Extensible architecture

Modules can expand from scenario planning into market research and future workflow templates.

Enterprise deployment ready

Supports production infrastructure, observability, and operational resilience from day one.

Bring one strategic question. Leave with a scenario map and next moves.

We can walk your team through a sample workflow, configure a grounded analysis using your own material, or scope an enterprise deployment.
